title: DebuggerTaskPacket
description: STORY-032.1: the envelope the Supervisor composes (029.4) and sends to the Debugger on failure. The Debugger diagnoses from the broken result + acceptance + diff; it never receives the Developer's reasoning (fresh-context, EPIC-030/031).

packet_id.description: Unique id of this debug packet.

debug_goal.description: What the repair must achieve (re-satisfy the failed acceptance).

investigation_only.description: True when the Debugger may only investigate, not repair.

failure_context.description: The broken result: command, signature, logs ref, changed files (no Developer reasoning).

allowed_repair_scope.description: The hard bound — nothing may be touched outside it; scope is never widened.

required_analysis.description: Diagnosis steps the Debugger must perform.

failure_gene.description: The operative AVOID gene, or null for a fresh failure.

acceptance_that_failed.description: The acceptance criteria the Debugger must re-satisfy.

do_not_touch.description: Explicit do-not-touch guardrails beyond the repair scope.

output_required.description: Artifacts the Debugger turn must return (repair proposal, failure gene…).
